# cycloid_team (Resource)

Manage team in an organization.
Teams allows you to groupe people and assign permissions to it.

A team can get multiple roles assigned for custom permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Create an administrator team
resource "cycloid_team" "a_team" {
  name  = "The A-Team"
  owner = "hannibal"
  roles = [
    "organization-admin"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `roles` (List of String) List of roles canonicals to attribute to this team, you can list available roles using the Cycloid CLI following command: `cy list roles`

### Optional

- `canonical` (String) The canonical of the team will be inferred from the name if not specified.
- `name` (String) The name of the team, displayed in the UI. Either `name` or `canonical` must be filled.
- `organization` (String) The organization canonical where to create the team, default to the provider `default_organization`
- `owner` (String) The username of the team's owner, will default to the owner of the current API key at creation.
